validation.quantityPositive: Quantity must be greater than zero

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.name: Name
inventory.empty: No inventory items yet. Record a purchase with “Add to inventory” to create items.

expenseTransactionDetail.notFound: This transaction could not be found or is not an expense.
expenseTransactionDetail.lotsEmpty: No linked purchase lots for this expense.
expenseTransactionDetail.amountInvalid: Enter a valid expense amount (a negative number, e.g. -29.99).
expenseTransactionDetail.lotSumMismatch: Lot line amounts sum to €{{sumLots}} but this expense total is €{{absTxn}}. Adjust the fields so they match before saving.
expenseTransactionDetail.lotSumMismatchSaveBlocked: Lot amounts sum to €{{sumLots}} but the expense total is €{{absTxn}}. Make the totals match before saving.
expenseTransactionDetail.lotAmountInvalid: Enter a non-negative amount for this lot (e.g. 0 or 29.99).
expenseTransactionDetail.lotQuantityInvalid: Enter a positive quantity for this lot (e.g. 1000).

inventoryDetail.notFound: No inventory item with this id.
inventoryDetail.sectionsEmpty: No purchase lots or consumption recorded for this material yet.
inventoryDetail.qtyInvalid: Enter a non-negative whole number for current quantity.
inventoryDetail.lotQuantityInvalid: Enter a positive quantity for this lot.
inventoryDetail.lotAmountInvalid: Enter a non-negative amount for this lot (0 is allowed).
inventoryDetail.archiveConfirmMessage: Archive “{{name}}” and all its purchase lots? You can unarchive from the sheet if needed.

transactions.empty: No transactions yet. Add data in Google Sheets.

pieces.title: Pieces
pieces.name: Name
pieces.confirmConsumeMessage: Update this piece status? You can choose whether to decrement inventory.
pieces.confirmConsumeLowStock: Some lots do not have enough quantity for this piece. You can still complete the piece by unchecking “Decrement from inventory”.
pieces.confirmRestoreMessage: Move this piece back to pending? You can choose whether to restore inventory quantities.
pieces.statusNeedsLines: Add at least one material line before marking this piece done or failed.
pieces.statusInsufficientStockDetail: Could not decrement: {{detail}}. Uncheck “Decrement from inventory” or cancel.

validation.quantityPositive: Quantity must be greater than zero

jobs.archiveConfirmMessage: Archive job {{id}}? Linked pieces, notes, and tags will be archived.
jobs.confirmDeleteMessage: Delete job {{id}} and all its pieces and material lines? This cannot be undone.
jobs.paidPricingIncomplete: Set a price on every piece for this job before moving it to Paid or Cancelled.

validation.priceInvalid: Enter a valid price (0 or greater)

suggestedPrice.label: Suggested (materials × 3)
suggestedPrice.applyAriaLabel: Apply suggested price {{amount}} to the price field
suggestedPrice.errorIntro: Cannot suggest a price — missing purchase data for:

jobs.confirmPaidWithPrice: Mark this job as paid for {{price}}? An income transaction will be created.
jobs.confirmPaidNeedPrice: Enter the price for this job. An income transaction will be created. Use 0 for a gift.
jobs.paidCreateTransactionLabel: Create income transaction for this payment
jobs.confirmLeavePaidMessage: This job is paid and already has an income transaction. Changing it to "{{status}}" means if you mark it paid again, another income transaction will be added. Continue?

wizard.welcomeSubtitle: Where do you want to store your shop?
wizard.localFolderDesc: Files stay on your computer. Works offline. Chrome required.
wizard.googleDriveDesc: Synced to your Google account. Access from any device.
wizard.googleDriveOAuthHint: If sign-in did not continue automatically, click Google Drive again to open the Google sign-in window.
wizard.driveFileWarning: This app only sees Google Drive files and folders you open here. To use this shop on another device, save the folder ID from the URL.
wizard.folderIdHelper: Find the ID in the folder URL: drive.google.com/drive/folders/ID_HERE
wizard.createConfirmMessage: Create a new illo3d shop in "{{name}}"? Existing shop files will be overwritten.
wizard.oauthPopupBlocked: Could not open the sign-in window. Allow pop-ups for this site and try again.
wizard.oauthFailed: Sign-in did not complete. Please try again.
wizard.chromeRequired: Local folder storage needs a Chromium-based browser (for example Chrome or Edge).
wizard.errorNotShop: This folder is not an illo3d shop.
wizard.errorVersion: This shop was created with a different app version and cannot be opened.
wizard.errorPermissions: You do not have permission to access this shop's data.
wizard.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

workbook.discardMessage: Your local edits will be lost. Reload data from storage?
